name: Fattigmann I
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating thoroughly after each addition.
3. Add vanilla, brandy, or cognac.
4. Whip cream to stiff peaks and gently fold into mixture.
5. Stir in grated lemon rind and ground cardamom.
6. Incorporate flour until the dough is smooth.
7. Chill the dough for at least 30 minutes.
8. Roll out the dough as thinly as possible and cut into diamond shapes using a knife or fluted pastry wheel.
9. Make a small slit in the center of each diamond, then carefully pull one end through the slit to form a cone shape.
10. Lower each cone-shaped piece gently into hot shortening (350°F) without fully submerging.
11. Fry until lightly browned; they cook quickly and should be removed promptly using tongs.
12. Drain on paper towels and sprinkle with sugar.
Makes about 10 dozen fattigmann.
